name: Tap-In: Putts & Brews
about: Tap-In: Putts & Brews is an indoor venue combining golf and football simulators with self-pour tap walls and a food menu. It features Full Swing Simulators for various sports, including golf, baseball, and hunting, alongside digital game tables and snacks. The venue allows for both online booking and walk-ins, offering different events and activities daily. It is located in Clemson, South Carolina, and is positioned as a family-friendly spot where kids 12 and under play free with a paying adult.
why_golfers_like_it: Full Swing Simulators provide a realistic and high-quality golf simulation experience
Self-pour taps offer a casual, no-pressure environment for golfers to enjoy drinks
Kid-friendly policy allows golfers to bring their families without extra cost for children
Variety of events and promotions provide regular opportunities to play at a discounted rate

food_and_drink.notes: Full food menu available with craveable snacks
Self-pour tap wall with craft beers and ciders available; no BYOB mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end multi-sport simulators for golf, football, soccer, hockey, zombie dodgeball, baseball, and hunting

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify if clubs are provided or if customers need to bring their own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue has its own food and drink menu, including a self-pour tap wall. No mention of outside food or drink being allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for playing 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, kids 12 and under play for free with a paying adult, and the venue hosts birthday parties and family-friendly events.
